source: dps.psx.com.pk Data Portal (Playwright MCP index board + screenshot) + POST /historical OHLC (plain requests); macro via WebSearch (brecorder/dawn/dailypakistan/tradingeconomics)
rung: rung 1 (plain requests POST /historical for OHLC) + Playwright MCP for index board/screenshot

index.note: KSE100 close from PSX portal marquee + POST /historical (both 177039.8). KSE30 +2.84%, KMI30 +2.73%, ALLSHR +2.42%, BKTI(banks) +2.59%, OGTI(oil-gas) +1.97%. Broad relief rally; many small/mid-caps hit +10% upper circuit. Advancers/decliners not captured this run (portal breadth widget not parsed).

commodities.note: Brent ~$80, 8-week low, -5.6% on day (US-Iran interim peace progress). Down from ~$88-89 on 06-13 and ~$94 on 06-11. Falling-oil regime deepening — E&P revenue-realization headwind.

macro_news.headline: SBP holds policy rate at 11.5% in final FY26 MPC meeting; cautious stance citing inflation, fiscal and global risks
macro_news.note: No hike (49/49 hold-vs-hike split going in). Relief rally +2.69%. R-004 binary event resolved. Rate-sensitive banks + leveraged cement rallied hardest. Elevated-rate regime (11.5%) persists -> R-001 NIM thesis intact.

macro_news.headline: Brent crude crashes ~5.6% to ~$80/bbl, an 8-week low, on US-Iran interim peace progress
macro_news.note: Falling-oil regime. E&P revenue-realization headwind. OGTI oil-gas index +1.97% lagged the broad +2.69% tape. R-EXP-003 falling-oil-regime persists.

macro_news.headline: Risk appetite revived by US-Iran de-escalation + reform-oriented FY27 budget measures
macro_news.note: Geopolitical de-escalation = lower oil but higher equity risk appetite. Cement budget winners (construction-WHT cut) led: DGKC +7.14%, CHCC +6.94%, LUCK +4.51%.

events_today: SBP MPC: policy rate HELD at 11.5%
warnings: Advancers/decliners breadth not parsed this run (index board widget). Index level/% verified two ways (portal marquee + POST /historical).
